curation_notes: Pre-assigned as xss from CWE-79, but the patch fixes unsanitized URL interpolation into a JavaScript script string executed via child_process.execFileSync(). The test confirms arbitrary OS command execution via require('child_process').execSync('id'). Reclassified to command-injection. Two commits form the complete fix: 5ee0b1676d4ce20cc2a70d1c9c8d6f1e3f57efac (PR #1586) changed single-quote wrapping to template literals, and d23834c232f1cf5519c9418b073f1dcec6b2f0fd (PR #1588) replaced template literal interpolation with JSON.stringify() for proper escaping. Only one non-test source file modified (SyncFetchScriptBuilder.ts). No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
